executiveSummary: The site is at 60 percent because four amateur tells are baked into shared components and propagate across 38+ generated pages. First: globals.css runs five concurrent animations under every paragraph (bloom-drift, conic-rotate, screen-flicker, hero-weight-breath, body::before color seams) — premium references run static surfaces. Second: cyan accent has metastasized from signal to wallpaper at 30+ touches per page (card stripes, table headers, list bullets, timeline glows, citation indices, eyebrows). Third: the `::` mono-uppercase eyebrow pattern is baked into GenericPage.tsx and Header self-purged but never propagated — mono is currently the dominant typeface on /learn instead of humanist sans. Fourth: hero verbosity (H1 + 4 paragraphs of throat-clearing, no above-fold CTA) is the inverse of Apple/Stripe/Linear/Anthropic discipline. The fix is pure subtraction at the shared-component layer: delete the global animation block, demote cyan from decoration to hover-only signal, strip `::` eyebrows site-wide, enforce a hero contract in the renderer. Net effect: one structural sweep heals 38 pages simultaneously, restores measurable WCAG 1.4.3 contrast (text never drops below full opacity), and aligns the document root with the brand-constant black. Operator lands at premium parity without changing palette, voice, or copy doctrine.

topThemes.theme: Decorative motion under prose — delete it at the document root, reserve it for one-shot intentional moments
topThemes.diagnosis: globals.css stacks bloom-drift (40s), conic-rotate (80s), body::before color seams, hero-pulse-weight (font-axis breath 5.6s), and screen-flicker (8s site-wide on the children wrapper at layout.tsx:192). Body text never hits full contrast for ~3-4% of every cycle — measurable WCAG 1.4.3 regression plus the strongest amateur tell on the site. Apple, Anthropic, Stripe, Linear ship zero rotating gradients or text-modulating opacity behind prose.
topThemes.remedy: Delete body, body::before, body::after, bloom-drift, conic-rotate, hero-pulse-weight, hero-weight-breath from globals.css (lines 86-175). Flatten html/body to background:#000. Strip 'screen-flicker' className from layout.tsx:192 children wrapper. Replace 'hero-pulse-weight' className at AuroraHero.tsx:412 with fixed [font-variation-settings:'wght'_700]. Preserve component-scoped motion (scanlines, cta-orbital, receipt-row, cockpit-fill, proof-marquee, pulse-ring) — they earn their motion budget. Prune dead .hero-pulse-weight selectors from prefers-reduced-motion block at globals.css:482-486. Also update legacy light-mode override at globals.css:204-208 to keep brand-constant consistency.

topThemes.theme: Cyan accent restraint — reduce site-wide touches from 30+ per page to 3 (hero eyebrow, citation indices, hover-only signal)
topThemes.diagnosis: GenericPage.tsx hard-codes cyan into 12 distinct decoration roles (card left-borders line 255, list bullet ▲ line 192, table headers line 214, timeline rail+glow lines 285-291, citation indices line 99, crosslink eyebrow+hover lines 131-142, card meta line 264, section background film line 73). Multiplied across 38 generated pages plus cyber index 11 cards × 4px stripe = 44px stacked cyan per viewport. Eye stops parsing it as accent, reads it as body color. Premium references reserve accent for one or two anchor moments per viewport.
topThemes.remedy: Hard rule: cyan keeps three jobs site-wide — (1) the single hero eyebrow as signature mark, (2) [NN] citation indices (utility, tabular), (3) hover state on interactive elements. Everything else demotes to #9BA5A7 (tertiary text) or #1A2225 (hairline). Delete section background film at GenericPage.tsx:73, delete card left-stripes at line 255 + cyber/page.tsx:245 + platforms/page.tsx, demote table headers (drop style={{color:accent}}) at line 214, demote card.meta to text-[#9BA5A7] at line 264, neutralize timeline (rail #1A2225, dots #9BA5A7, drop boxShadow glow), demote ::sources cited eyebrow at line 86 and ::keep going eyebrow at line 131 to #6B7779. Keep cyan on chip hover at line 142. Differentiate global CTA: Header pill becomes ONE solid bg-[#22F0D5] text-black pill site-wide, in-flow page primaries become ghost (border + transparent + cyan text).

topThemes.theme: Eyebrow purge — strip `::` mono-uppercase chrome and reserve one humanist-sans eyebrow per page maximum
topThemes.diagnosis: The `::tag` literal appears ~100+ times across 30+ files; mono is the dominant typeface on /learn (~40 mono spans on one page). GenericPage.tsx:57-62 bakes it into the hero kicker so all 38 generated pages inherit identical CTF-banner chrome. Header.tsx self-critiqued this pattern at lines 18-21 but the purge never propagated to content pages, Footer, MobileNav, or the GenericPage renderer. CTA pills currently render as mono-caps eyebrows (e.g. learn/page.tsx:515 `open the {path.id} path →`) — a category error where actions read as metadata. Three different tracking values (0.22em / 0.28em / 0.32em) with no semantic mapping.
topThemes.remedy: Delete the `::` literal everywhere via search-replace across GenericPage.tsx (lines 61, 86, 131), learn/page.tsx (~11 instances), learn/cyber/page.tsx (lines 187, 226, 247, 264, 327), platforms/modern/labs/serve. Remove GenericPage.tsx hero kicker block lines 56-62 entirely — page.title carries the open; page.subtitle becomes a humanist-sans sub-headline below the H1, not an above-H1 mono chip. Convert all CTA pills from font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.28em] to text-sm font-medium sentence-case humanist sans. Convert card.meta from mono-caps to text-xs text-[#9BA5A7]. Convert breadcrumbs to humanist sans text-xs. Reserve mono uppercase ONLY for: [NN] citation indices (tabular numerics), ticker symbols where ticker is literally a code, the single hero eyebrow when used as signature mark. Create app/_components/Eyebrow.tsx primitive with text-[12px] font-medium text-[#9BA5A7] sentence-case (no `::`, no caps, no extreme tracking).

topThemes.theme: Hero contract — one lede + one CTA above the fold, runtime-enforced at the renderer
topThemes.diagnosis: /learn/cyber leads with H1 + four paragraphs (~150 words) before any nav or CTA. GenericPage.tsx renders intro as whitespace-pre-line with zero length enforcement — content packs sneak walls of text into hero (models intro ~1100 chars). /learn/cyber/modern hero ends with a meta-disclaimer that belongs in a footer. Apple/Stripe/Linear hero topology = 1 H1 + 1 supporting paragraph + 1 primary CTA. None of the hand-built heroes (cyber, modern, platforms, learn index, founders-view, orangebox) carry a primary CTA above the fold. Three different hero leading values (1 / 1.02 / 1.05); three hero size scales (5xl / 6xl / 7xl) with no surface-tier mapping.
topThemes.remedy: Refactor GenericPage.tsx ContentPage type in types.ts: change `intro: string` to `intro: { lede: string; cta?: { label: string; href: string } }` with a runtime 160-char truncation guard (use useEffect, NOT inline console.warn — avoid React render-side-effect anti-pattern). Migrate 38+ content packs in a paired commit (every materialized page.tsx under /learn/atlas, career, decode, trust, models, conferences plus the .scripts/materialize-nvidia-tier-50.mjs generator). On /learn/cyber/page.tsx: collapse lines 194-219 to one ≤30-word lede + one primary CTA pill linking to /learn/cyber/path; move the authorization paragraph to the existing 'this track is NOT' section at lines 324-373 (single source of truth) while preserving the load-bearing 'line between ethical hacking and federal prison is authorization' line in the lede. On /learn/cyber/modern: collapse to one 35-word lede + primary CTA; preserve the 'public-info only · best-effort' epistemic-honesty disclosure in the eyebrow rather than deleting it (Mom's Law). Drop whitespace-pre-line everywhere. Tier H1 sizes by surface (hero/section/sub/inner) as a shared const.

topThemes.theme: Card walls vs comparison tables — keep editorial cards but strip the stripe; convert only genuinely scalar data to tables
topThemes.diagnosis: Three pages render as 10-14 identical bordered cards (platforms 10, labs 10, serve 14). The reviewer's first instinct (convert all three to tables) overshoots because (a) platform/serve `body` fields are 80-120 words of substantive editorial — Atom's hand-written take on Palantir's Maven win, Anduril's CCA contract — hiding under <details> degrades the page from 'lab-grade editorial atlas' to 'SaaS pricing comparison'; (b) `ticker` strings are ragged-length narrative ('PLTR · NASDAQ' vs 'Private (Series F, valued $14B+ as of 2024)') and won't align cleanly in a table cell; (c) the codebase has zero `<table>` elements anywhere and converting 3 pages while leaving 14 sibling card pages unchanged creates everything-app sprawl. But the 4px cyan left-stripe IS noise — 34 stacked stripes is wallpaper.
topThemes.remedy: Two-tier fix. (1) UNIVERSAL: delete the per-card `borderLeft: 4px solid #22F0D5` inline style from ALL 17 catalog pages site-wide in one sweep — this is the genuine noise, and one stripe per section as a `border-t-[3px] border-t-[#22F0D5]` above the catalog regains accent meaning. Delete `::slug` mono prefixes inside cards. Strip card to: border + bg + padding + clean header row (company name + small mono meta + official↗ on one aligned line). Body prose stays inline visible (it's the product). (2) TARGETED: convert labs page (app/learn/cyber/labs/page.tsx) to a `<table>` — its data is genuinely scalar (cost $14/$20/free, level beginner-senior, order 1-10 as numeric column). Add mobile card fallback below md. Keep platforms + serve as cards with the stripe deleted and header tightened. Result: 34 redundant stripes removed, accent regains meaning, editorial density preserved, one new pattern introduced (labs table) instead of three.

topThemes.theme: System replacement — collapse seven section paddings, eight leadings, five max-widths to a shared 2-tier rhythm
topThemes.diagnosis: /learn cycles through seven different section paddings (py-10/12/16/20/24/28) with no semantic difference. Eight leading values (1.55/1.6/1.625/1.65/1.7/1.75/leading-relaxed bare). Five max-widths for the same content type. Three hero leading values, three hero size scales. Footer contradicts Header IA (exposes /where-am-i, /tools, /vs, /prompt-kit, /glossary as top-level Learn that Header folded into 5 hint-described items). Footer ships 6 columns, dual accents (cyan + #FF7A1A on Products), animated pulse dot, 'Lab Status' sitrep column, v6 badge, 'Æ Research' prefix — every pattern Header.tsx self-purged at lines 18-21.
topThemes.remedy: Adopt 2-tier section rhythm site-wide: `py-16 md:py-24` default, `py-24 md:py-32` reserved for hero + final CTA only. Replace_all py-20 md:py-28 → py-16 md:py-24 across learn/page.tsx, learn/cyber/page.tsx, platforms/page.tsx. Standardize hero leading to leading-[1.05] sm:leading-[1.02] md:leading-[1] (never let line-height equal font-size on mobile). Cap prose at max-w-[58ch] on lede paragraphs; sections stay max-w-4xl, table sections max-w-5xl. Rebuild Footer to 4 columns mirroring Header dropdowns 1:1 (Brand / Learn / Products / Lab); delete Lab Status column, animate-pulse Start chip, v6 badge, Æ-prefix, dual-accent Products column; column headers go from font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] to text-[12px] font-medium text-[#9BA5A7] sentence-case. Drop /where-am-i, /tools, /vs, /prompt-kit, /glossary from footer surface (Header already hides them). Net: 35+ links → 18, 6 cols → 4, 2 accents → 1 (hover-only), 1 animation → 0.

implementationOrder.change: Delete site-wide decorative motion. (a) globals.css: flatten html/body to background:#000; delete body block (lines 86-102), body::after block (104-126), bloom-drift + conic-rotate keyframes (128-137), hero-pulse-weight class + hero-weight-breath keyframe (139-150), body::before block (152-175). (b) layout.tsx:192: strip 'screen-flicker' className from children wrapper. (c) AuroraHero.tsx:412: replace className='hero-pulse-weight' with [font-variation-settings:'wght'_700] arbitrary value. (d) Prune dead .hero-pulse-weight references from prefers-reduced-motion block at globals.css:482-486. (e) Update legacy light-mode override at globals.css:204-208 from #04100d to #000 for brand-constant consistency. PRESERVE: scanlines, cta-orbital, receipt-row, cockpit-fill, proof-marquee, pulse-ring, mesh-gradient — all component-scoped, earned their motion budget.
implementationOrder.rationale: Largest single quality jump available on the site. Removes the strongest amateur tell in one sitting — prose at 100% contrast 100% of the time, no rotating background, no breathing headline weight, no document-wide opacity flicker. Heals WCAG 1.4.3 contrast and 2.2.2 pause/stop/hide violations. Reduces globals.css by ~97 lines. Composite-layer repaint cycles return to scroll responsiveness. Estimated +5 to +8 points on the 60→100 gauge from this fix alone.

implementationOrder.change: Cyan demotion in the shared renderer. Single file, 38 pages healed. (a) Line 73: remove bg-[#0e2520]/15 section film — keep pure black. (b) Line 192: replace cyan ▲ bullet with `<span aria-hidden className='mt-2.5 h-px w-3 shrink-0 bg-[#1A2225]' />` quiet hairline (preserves aria-hidden so screen readers stop announcing 'black up-pointing triangle' on every list item). (c) Lines 211-215: drop style={{color:accent}} from table th, replace with text-[#9BA5A7]. (d) Lines 250-256: DELETE the `style={{borderLeft: '4px solid ${accent}'}}` inline style from cards. (e) Lines 261-268: demote card.meta from mono cyan to text-xs text-[#9BA5A7] sentence-case humanist sans. (f) Lines 285-296 timeline: borderColor #1A2225 (not accent/40), dots h-2 w-2 bg-[#9BA5A7] (drop boxShadow glow), date labels text-[#9BA5A7]. (g) Lines 86-90 ::sources cited eyebrow: demote to text-[#6B7779] (citations [NN] indices KEEP cyan at line 99 as utility marker). (h) Lines 131-136 ::keep going eyebrow: demote to text-[#6B7779]; KEEP cyan on chip hover at line 142.
implementationOrder.rationale: One file, 38 pages healed. Per-page cyan touches drop from ~30 to 3 (hero eyebrow + citation indices + hover). Hero eyebrow earns its color because nothing competes. Section film removal restores ~70% of viewport to true black, sharpening every typographic contrast against #F2F4F5. Aria-hidden on decorative bullets fixes a real screen-reader noise defect.

implementationOrder.change:
Eyebrow purge in the renderer + new primitive. (a) DELETE the kicker `

::{page.subtitle}

` block at GenericPage.tsx:56-62 entirely — page.title carries the section open; render page.subtitle as a humanist-sans sub-headline at mt-6 max-w-2xl text-base leading-[1.5] text-[#9BA5A7] BELOW the H1 (no `::`, no mono, no caps). (b) Delete `::` literal from citations kicker (line 86) and crosslinks kicker (line 131); convert to proper `

Sources

` and `

Keep reading

` — semantic h2 fixes a WCAG 1.3.1 defect where styled-as-heading paragraphs failed screen-reader heading navigation. (c) Drop `tracking-[0.32em]` to `tracking-[0.08em]` and `uppercase` on table th and breadcrumbs (mono stays, caps go). (d) Create app/_components/Eyebrow.tsx primitive: `text-[12px] font-medium leading-[1.2] text-[#9BA5A7]` with optional `tone='accent'` for the one signature mark per page; document 'never use as heading replacement' so future devs don't regress semantics.
implementationOrder.rationale:
Flips the dominant typeface on /learn from JetBrains Mono back to humanist sans. Fixes a real semantic defect (citations/crosslinks kickers were `

` styled as headings — failed WCAG 1.3.1 + 2.4.6). The `::` deletion in the shared renderer alone propagates to 38 generated pages. Eyebrow primitive prevents regrowth.

implementationOrder.change:
Strip mono-caps eyebrows and CTA pills site-page-by-site-page starting with /learn (highest density). Search-replace `::` literal everywhere in JSX (~11 instances at lines 194, 265, 282, 360, 399, 410, 421, 432, 452, 479, 489, 502, 515, 527, 546, 665, 705, 776, 807, 848). Delete kicker `

` blocks at section opens (lines 360, 452, 527, 665, 705, 756, 807) — the H2 already opens; roll the kicker copy into the existing `

` subtitle below H2 in humanist sans sentence-case. Convert all CTA pills from `font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-[#22F0D5]` to `text-sm font-medium text-[#22F0D5]` sentence-case (lines 515, 654, 717, 723, +8 more). LabHero eyebrow prop at line 204: strip the `::atomeons · ...` prefix entirely or reduce to a tight 2-token signature.

implementationOrder.rationale: /learn carries the largest mono-caps debt (~40 mono spans → 2). CTAs read as actions instead of metadata. Section H2s breathe. Two-tier section rhythm (py-16 md:py-24) replaces the seven-padding chaos.

implementationOrder.change: Rebuild Footer with Header doctrine. Grid 6-col → 4-col (md:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr_1fr_1fr]); gap-8 py-12 → gap-10 py-16. DELETE: animate-pulse 'start here' chip (lines 24-32), entire 'Lab Status' column (lines 97-118), v6 badge (lines 139-141), 'independent AI research · LAB ONLINE' tagline (lines 125-127), 'Æ Research' prefix (line 55). Collapse Learn column from 10 links to 5 mirroring Header dropdown (curriculum, playbooks, synthesis, deep, start) — drop /where-am-i, /tools, /vs, /prompt-kit, /glossary, /search, /ai, /faq. Fold Research + About + Legal columns into single 'Lab' column (Papers, Founder's View, About, Press, /now). Column headers: text-[12px] font-medium text-[#9BA5A7] sentence-case (was font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em]). Products column: header neutral text-[#9BA5A7], link hovers unified to hover:text-[#22F0D5] (was #FF7A1A — one accent only). Bottom bar: keep copyright + LinkedIn verify; ADD inline Terms/Privacy/Refunds links so they remain reachable. Move @AtomMccree to bottom bar as quiet text link.
implementationOrder.exampleAfter:

implementationOrder.rationale: Footer was contradicting Header's own self-purge doctrine (Header.tsx:18-21 explicitly named CTF-banner + dual accents + 8+ items as the renounced pattern). 35+ links → 18, 6 cols → 4, 2 accents → 1, 1 animation → 0, 1 badge → 0. Single IA across Header and Footer.

implementationOrder.change: Add active nav state — promised at line 31, never implemented. Convert Header to client component: add `'use client'` at line 1 OR extract NavLink/NavTrigger client subcomponent. Import `usePathname` from 'next/navigation'. For each link/dropdown trigger: `const active = pathname === href || pathname.startsWith(href + '/')`. Apply 1px cyan underline via `after:absolute after:left-0 after:right-0 after:-bottom-[22px] after:h-px after:bg-[#22F0D5]` when active; add `aria-current={active ? 'page' : undefined}`. Differentiate the global CTA pill at lines 159-163: convert from ghost (`border-[#22F0D5]/40 bg-[#22F0D5]/10 text-[#22F0D5]`) to ONE solid cyan pill (`rounded-full bg-[#22F0D5] px-4 py-1.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-black hover:bg-[#1AD4BD]`) — Stripe pattern, one anchor CTA site-wide. In-flow page primaries downgrade to ghost-with-cyan-text (border + transparent + cyan text).
implementationOrder.rationale: Linear/Stripe table-stakes feature is currently missing on desktop (MobileNav has it — mobile is more navigable than desktop on this dimension). Differentiated CTA restores click-signal (identical ghost pill currently repeats 5+ times per visit, eye stops reading it as primary).

implementationOrder.change:
Hero contract refactor. types.ts: change `intro: string` to `intro: { lede: string; cta?: { label: string; href: string } }` with JSDoc '/** lede: hard ceiling 160 chars — overflow goes into sections[0] */'. GenericPage.tsx: render single `

` lede (no whitespace-pre-line) + optional primary CTA pill (ghost variant) below; add useEffect-based dev warning if lede.length > 160 (NOT inline render-time console.warn — that's a React anti-pattern that fires every render). Pair with 38-file migration in same PR: update every page.tsx under /learn/atlas, career, decode, trust, models, conferences, etc., plus the materialize-nvidia-tier-50.mjs generator at lines 36 and 74. For content packs whose current intro is >160 chars (models, atlas/history, etc.), split: first 160 chars become lede, remainder becomes sections[0].kind='prose' content. Add Zod schema validation at materializer build-time as the durable guard.
implementationOrder.rationale: Single structural change closes the 'hero wall' failure across 38 pages and prevents the next content pack from regressing. Apple/Stripe/Linear hero topology (1 H1 + 1 lede + 1 CTA) becomes the durable contract. Must ship as paired commit — type change without migration = TypeScript compile break across /learn surface.

implementationOrder.change: Apply hero contract to the two hand-built heroes operator surfaced. cyber/page.tsx lines 184-221: collapse 4-paragraph wall (~150 words) to ONE ≤30-word lede + ONE primary CTA pill to /learn/cyber/path. CRITICAL: preserve the load-bearing 'line between ethical hacking and federal prison is authorization' line IN the lede — that's the page's trust signal and unfakeable-for-the-audience hook. Move the longer authorization detail paragraph into the existing 'what this track is NOT' section at lines 324-373 (single source of truth, semantically correct home). DELETE the closing meta-disclaimer paragraph at lines 215-219 — covered by eyebrow + NOT section. modern/page.tsx lines 128-150: keep H1 (133-136); collapse paragraphs to ONE ≤35-word lede. PRESERVE the epistemic-honesty disclosure ('public-info only · cited sources · best-effort · current to mid-2026') by moving it INTO the eyebrow at line 130 rather than deleting it — Mom's Law / lab-grade voice contract.
implementationOrder.exampleAfter:

implementationOrder.rationale: Two heroes the operator personally flagged. Preserves the load-bearing operator-distinctive trust signals (authorization line, epistemic-honesty contract) while collapsing word count by ~80%. Primary CTA promoted from buried-in-footer to above-the-fold.

implementationOrder.change: UNIVERSAL stripe removal — single sweep across 17 catalog pages. Delete the `style={{borderLeft: '4px solid ${ACCENT}'}}` inline style on every card across platforms, serve (military + federal), labs, certs, ai-security, hackerone, /learn/calc, /learn/decode, /learn/trust, /learn/career, /learn/atlas, /learn/synthesis, /learn/templates, /learn/decision-tree, /learn/deep, /research/lessons-from-sci-fi, /glossary/opengraph (~17 files). Add ONE `border-t-[3px] border-t-[#22F0D5]` to the catalog section's container above the card list — accent appears once per section as a top rule (Stripe pattern). Strip per-card `::slug` mono eyebrows inside cards. Tighten card header to a clean inline row: name (text-[15px] font-medium) + small mono meta (text-[10px] text-[#9BA5A7]) + official↗ link on one aligned baseline. Body prose stays visible inline (it's the product). DO NOT introduce <table> on platforms/serve — ragged ticker strings and 80-120 word bodies don't fit table cells, and hiding editorial under <details> degrades lab-grade voice.

implementationOrder.rationale: 34+ stacked 4px cyan stripes across the site → 17 single top rules. Accent regains meaning. Editorial density preserved (no <details> hiding the body prose users came for). Zero everything-app sprawl from introducing a divergent table pattern on 3 pages.

implementationOrder.change: TARGETED table conversion — labs only. Data is genuinely scalar: order (1-10 numeric), cost (free/$14/$20 — tabular-nums compares cleanly), level (beginner→senior — short enum), platform name (single token). Replace card stack at lines 158-175 with `<table className='hidden md:table w-full border-collapse border-t-[3px] border-t-[#22F0D5]'>` + mobile `<ul className='md:hidden space-y-3'>` per-row compact card fallback. Columns: # (font-mono tabular-nums text-[#22F0D5]) | Platform | Cost (tabular-nums) | Level | Visit ↗. Body paragraph stays VISIBLE inline below the row title — not hidden under <details>. Add `<caption className='sr-only'>` for SR. Add `<th scope='col'>` to all headers. Hover rows with `hover:bg-[#0e2520]/25 motion-safe:transition-colors motion-safe:duration-150`. Make the Visit ↗ link 44×44 min target with focus-visible ring. NOTE: do NOT use aria-sort unless the table is interactively sortable.
implementationOrder.exampleAfter:

implementationOrder.rationale: Labs is the only catalog with genuinely scalar comparable data. Tabular-nums on cost makes $14/$20/free align vertically. Body stays visible (editorial density preserved). One new pattern site-wide (labs table) instead of three — no everything-app sprawl.

implementationOrder.change: Mobile compliance pass. MobileNav.tsx: (a) Hamburger button h-10 w-10 → h-11 w-11 -mr-2 to hit Apple HIG 44×44 floor. (b) Replace emoji `☰`/`✕` with lucide-react `<Menu/>`/`<X/>` SVG icons (platform-independent). (c) Add Escape key handler via useEffect listening on `keydown` while open. (d) Consolidate four useState accordion flags into single `openSection: 'learn'|'products'|'research'|null` (accordion correctness — only one open at a time). (e) Bump sub-link hint text from text-[12px] text-[#6B7779] (3.8:1 — fails WCAG AA) to text-[13px] text-[#9BA5A7] leading-[1.45] (AA pass). (f) Sub-link rows px-3 py-2 → px-3 py-3 to hit 44px tap target. (g) Header h-16 → h-14 md:h-16 with `pt-[env(safe-area-inset-top)]` on the sticky wrapper. Calculator.tsx lines 158-166: add `text-base` to `<input>` and `<select>` (16px — stops iOS Safari auto-zoom on focus, the magic threshold). py-2.5 → py-3 to hit 48px tap target. Add `font-mono tabular-nums` to numeric inputs so typing 1,000,000 renders with stable column widths. Move unit out of label into right-side adornment inside input via `<span className='absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2'>`. Replace cyan ▲ assumption-bullets with neutral hairline matching the GenericPage primitive (same shape, different color = same visual grammar across components).
implementationOrder.rationale: Fixes the iOS Safari auto-zoom trap that throws calculator layout out of the viewport on focus (single largest mobile UX defect). Hamburger reaches Apple HIG floor. Hint text passes WCAG AA contrast. Escape handler + accordion correctness + safe-area-inset are table-stakes mobile compliance.

implementationOrder.change: Citations from 25-card wall to academic hanging-indent list (lines 91-122). Replace `<div className='rounded-xl border border-[#1A2225] bg-[#0A0F11] p-4'>` cards with `<ol className='mt-6 divide-y divide-[#1A2225]/60'>` + `<li className='grid grid-cols-[2.5rem_1fr] gap-4 py-4'>` hanging-indent rows: [NN] index in mono tabular-nums (cyan, KEEP as utility marker) + claim/source on the right. Fits 25 citations in half the vertical space. For data tables (lines 206-240): add `min-w-[720px]` to force honest horizontal scroll; add fade-gradient overlay `<div className='pointer-events-none absolute inset-y-0 right-0 w-12 bg-gradient-to-l from-[#0A0F11] to-transparent md:hidden' />` as scroll hint; sticky first column with `sticky left-0 z-10 bg-[#0A0F11]`; mobile card fallback `<div className='md:hidden space-y-3'>` stacked below md; tabular-nums + right-align on numeric columns; zebra rows via `[&_tbody_tr:nth-child(even)]:bg-[#0A0F11]/60`. Lift hero lede paragraphs from #9BA5A7 to #C8CCCE site-wide (search-replace on lede positions at learn/page.tsx:366,458,534,672,762 + founders-view/page.tsx:132 + learn/cyber/page.tsx:254) — lede should be secondary tier, not tertiary.
implementationOrder.exampleAfter:
{/* Citations — academic hanging indent */}
    {citations.map((c, i) => (
  1. [{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}]

    {c.claim}

    {c.source}

    2. ))}
{/* Tables — fade hint, sticky first col, mobile fallback */}
...
{/* per-row card fallback */}
implementationOrder.rationale: /learn/models and /learn/atlas/history each end in a 25-card citation wall — replacing with hanging-indent halves vertical space and matches academic/lab-grade reference style. Table fade hint + sticky first column + mobile fallback fixes the 8-column scroll-bomb spreadsheet on phones. Lede tier promotion (#9BA5A7 → #C8CCCE) fixes a real contrast hierarchy defect where lede paragraphs were rendering at tertiary instead of secondary.

estimatedTotalImpact: 85-92%. Step 1 alone (delete global animation block + screen-flicker) is the largest single quality jump and lands ~5-8 points. Steps 2-3 (cyan demotion + eyebrow purge in the renderer) propagate across 38 generated pages from one file each and land another ~10-15 points. Steps 4-6 (Footer rebuild + Header active state + /learn cleanup) close the IA/system gap and add ~7-10 points. Steps 7-8 (hero contract refactor + cyber heroes) close the Apple/Stripe topology gap and add ~5-8 points. Steps 9-12 (catalog stripe removal + labs table + mobile compliance + citations) close the polish-finish gap and add ~3-5 points. Realistic ceiling without changing palette, voice, or copy doctrine is mid-to-high 80s — the remaining 8-15% requires product visuals in heroes (Apple/Stripe carry visual mass next to text), surface-specific tier-1 photography, and a content-side editorial pass on the longer prose sections, all of which are out of scope for this typography/hierarchy/spacing/density/motion/layout pass.
riskNotes: TypeScript compile break risk on Step 7 (hero contract refactor): changing ContentPage.intro from `string` to `{ lede; cta? }` will fail typecheck across 38+ already-materialized page.tsx files plus .scripts/materialize-nvidia-tier-50.mjs (lines 36, 74) plus the `makeMetaDescription(intro)` helper. Must ship the type change, all 38 content pack migrations, and the materializer update in a SINGLE PR. Run `pnpm typecheck` between every batch; revert if intermediate state breaks the build.

Light-mode override at globals.css:204-208 still uses legacy #04100d (warm-teal). With Step 1 flipping the dark base to #000, light and dark schemes will disagree on the brand-constant base. Either remove the light-mode block entirely (site is intentionally dark-only per brand doctrine) or update to a brand-consistent light surface. Verify which posture the operator wants before merging Step 1.

Step 9 (universal stripe removal across 17 catalog pages) needs visual diff on at least 3 sample pages before merge: one platforms/serve-style page (cyber/platforms), one labs-style page (cyber/labs — note this gets converted to table in Step 10 instead), one /research catalog page. Catalog pages exist outside /learn/cyber that the synthesis brief did not enumerate — grep `borderLeft.*solid` across the codebase before sweeping.

Step 1 deletes `hero-pulse-weight` className from globals.css. The className is referenced in AuroraHero.tsx:412 (confirmed) and possibly elsewhere — run `grep -r 'hero-pulse-weight' app/` before deleting the class to catch any other consumers. Same check for `screen-flicker` className (Step 1 removes it from layout.tsx:192, but if AtomBoot or LabTicker components opt-in by that classname, those usages stay — verify intent).

Step 7's runtime length guard MUST use useEffect (not inline render-side-effect with comma operator). Per React rules, `process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' ? console.warn(...) : null` inside JSX fires on every render including HMR cycles, will lint-fail under most React configs, and degrades dev perf. Build-time Zod validation in the materializer is the durable answer; useEffect is the runtime fallback.

Step 8's lede rewrites for cyber/cyber-modern must preserve operator-distinctive voice. Specifically: do NOT replace the 'line between ethical hacking and federal prison is authorization' line with a generic 'masters-grade map' lede (that's marketing-deck voice). Do NOT delete the 'public-info only · best-effort' epistemic-honesty disclosure on modern/page.tsx — move it into the eyebrow rather than deleting it. Mom's Law: full effort = preserve the trust signals that make the page unfakeable for the audience.

Step 10 (labs table) must include focus-visible styling on the Visit ↗ icon link — current cards rely on cyan border hover for sighted users and have no `:focus-visible` for keyboard users. Adding the table without focus-visible is a keyboard-nav regression. Apply `focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#22F0D5]/40 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#0A0F11]` to all interactive elements touched in steps 6, 9, 10.

Step 11 Calculator change moves unit from label into right-side adornment inside the input. Verify that screen readers still announce the unit — wrap with `{i.unit}` adjacent to the visible adornment, OR use `aria-label` on the input that includes the unit, so SR users get the unit context they currently get from the label.

Footer rebuild (Step 5) removes /learn/where-am-i, /tools, /vs, /prompt-kit, /glossary, /search, /ai, /faq from footer surface. Verify these routes are still reachable via at least one other surface (Header dropdown, sitemap, in-content links) before merging — orphaned routes hurt SEO and break direct-link expectations.

Mobile compliance pass (Step 11) bumps Calculator inputs to text-base (16px) and py-3 (~48px). Verify that the calculator layout still fits on iPhone SE landscape (375px wide) after these changes — taller inputs may push assumption-list below the fold in narrow viewports. Run a Playwright snapshot at 375×667 and 390×844 after the change.

Header active-state implementation (Step 6) converts Header.tsx to a client component. If Header is currently rendered inside a Server Component layout, verify that the 'use client' directive doesn't cascade unwanted client-side hydration to child components. Cleaner pattern: extract `<NavLink>` + `<NavTrigger>` as client subcomponents and keep Header as a Server Component shell.

Cyan accent retention on [NN] citation indices (Step 12) — one reviewer flagged that keeping cyan on citation indices splits the accent budget between the hero eyebrow and 25 citation tags. This is intentional (citation indices are tabular utility markers, not decoration), but verify by visual diff on /learn/models (25 cites) — if the bottom-of-page citation block reads as a second cyan anchor competing with the hero, demote [NN] indices to #9BA5A7 with mono+tabular-nums carrying the rank instead.
